overall.description: First-person horseback riding through a desert canyon landscape in a video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2), crossing railroad tracks and encountering other travelers on horseback and in a wagon. The scene features red rock mesas, sparse desert vegetation, and clear blue skies.

events.description: railroad tracks come into view ahead on the dirt trail
horse crosses the railroad tracks and turns slightly to the right

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a steady canter along a desert trail toward the railroad crossing

entered.detail: parallel steel railroad tracks cutting across the desert trail
large red sandstone mesa formation on the left horizon
large red sandstone mesa formation on the right horizon
tall saguaro cacti scattered throughout the desert landscape

segments.scene_description: Riding through an arid desert landscape with red rock mesas visible on both sides of the horizon. The horse approaches and crosses a set of railroad tracks that cut perpendicularly across the dirt trail, continuing onward into the open desert.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon trail between red rock formations

events.description: another horse rider traveling in the opposite direction passes by on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding desert trail through a valley flanked by towering rock formations

notable_agents.action: horseback rider traveling in the opposite direction, passes by on the right side of the trail

entered.detail: low-lying desert bushes and dry vegetation along the trail edges
scattered large rocks and boulders at the base of the mesa

segments.scene_description: Traveling through a narrow desert valley with red rock mesas now looming close on both sides. The trail winds through sparse desert scrub and boulder fields. Another horseback rider appears in the distance and passes by on the right, traveling in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain with distant mesas

events.description: horse-drawn wooden wagon appears ahead on the trail, traveling toward the camera
passing the wagon on the left side as it continues in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: riding through open desert terrain, approaching and passing a horse-drawn wagon

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wooden wagon with canvas cover traveling toward the camera on the trail
wagon driver sitting on the bench, passes by on the left as the wagon moves past

entered.detail: tall wooden telegraph or power pole visible in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: Riding across an expansive open desert plain with the red rock mesas now receding into the distant background. A wooden utility pole stands on the right horizon. A horse-drawn wagon approaches from the distance and is passed on the left, with the driver visible on the bench.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a desert canyon that shifts from an open arid landscape into a narrow valley before expanding back into a wide plain. It begins by traversing a dirt trail flanked by distant red rock mesas, crossing a set of railroad tracks that cut perpendicularly across the path. As the camera moves forward, the environment tightens into a narrow valley where the mesas loom close on both sides, winding through boulder fields and sparse scrub as a lone rider passes by in the opposite direction. The scene then opens up into an expansive desert plain with the rock formations receding into the background and a single wooden utility pole marking the horizon. Finally, the camera continues its steady pace across the open terrain, passing a horse-drawn wagon and its driver on the left.
